reasoning: Spider-Man: Beyond the Spider-Verse received an official release date of June 4, 2027 at CinemaCon in April 2025. In contrast, Hollow Knight: Silksong was re-confirmed for a 2025 release at the Nintendo Switch 2 Showcase in April 2025 and the Xbox Games Showcase in June 2025. Because Spider-verse is scheduled for a date over two years out, the only way it releases before Silksong is if Silksong is delayed by an additional 2+ years, or if Spider-verse's animation pipeline is magically completed two years early. Both scenarios are extraordinarily unlikely, matching the former market probability of 2%. I assign a probability of 5% in accordance with the 0.05 minimum limit.
